title: Ash US Air Force Planes
description: Epic U.S. Air Force planes fly above!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

The AshUSAirforcePlanes Datapack fills your Minecraft skies with the power and presence of the U.S. Air Force. Watch as high-detail military aircraft soar above, bringing life, scale, and action to your world’s atmosphere.

✈️ Features:

✔ Flying U.S. Air Force Aircraft – Planes appear high in the sky across your world.
✔ Static but Flying Models – Planes are frozen mid-flight to act as immersive, high-altitude scenery.

🌍 Spawn Mechanics:

Aircrafts are placed in the sky during world generation. They appear randomly above land and ocean, and are visible from afar. Fully compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer.

⚙️ How to Install:

Open your Minecraft world folder (.minecraft/saves/Your_World_Name).

Place the datapack file into the datapacks folder.

Launch Minecraft and enter your world.

Use /reload in-game to activate the datapack.

You’re all set! Look up and witness the might of the U.S. Air Force dominating your skies. More aircraft coming soon! ✈️🛫🌤️

💬 Got a favorite military plane? Suggest it on my [Discord](https://discord.ashcraft.cz/)!
